measurement_note: Size is N, the word length. Every substring of an all-a word is wonderful, so a correct nested-boundary enumerator must visit all N(N+1)/2 intervals and cannot exit early. Prefix parity counting is linear; the enumerator completes all tiers but fails only by quadratic scaling.

cases.name: benchmark: count all intervals of 16 a characters
benchmark: count all intervals of 64 a characters
benchmark: count all intervals of 200 a characters
